ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was recorded */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the facility */,
  "electricity_facility" REAL /* Electricity consumption for the facility */,
  "fans_electricity" REAL /* Electricity consumption by fans */,
  "cooling_electricity" REAL /* Electricity consumption for cooling */,
  "heating_electricity" REAL /* Electricity consumption for heating */,
  "interior_lights_electricity" REAL /* Electricity consumption for interior lights */,
  "interior_equipment_electricity" REAL /* Electricity consumption for interior equipment */,
  "gas_facility" REAL /* Gas consumption for the facility */,
  "heating_gas" REAL /* Gas consumption for heating */,
  "interior_equipment_gas" REAL /* Gas consumption for interior equipment */,
  "water_heater_gas" REAL /* Gas consumption for water heating */,
  "renewable_energy" REAL /* Renewable energy usage (solar, wind, etc.) */,
  "energy_efficiency" REAL /* Energy efficiency rating (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp", "facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the facility contact person */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (office, warehouse, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy system (e.g., Cooling, Heating) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy system */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of energy system (HVAC, lighting, etc.) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the energy system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., facility manager, energy analyst, executive) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user login */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the report is for */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (monthly, quarterly, etc.) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the alert is for */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was triggered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (energy usage, temperature, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption_history" (
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was recorded */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the facility */,
  "electricity_facility" REAL /* Electricity consumption for the facility */,
  "fans_electricity" REAL /* Electricity consumption by fans */,
  "cooling_electricity" REAL /* Electricity consumption for cooling */,
  "heating_electricity" REAL /* Electricity consumption for heating */,
  "interior_lights_electricity" REAL /* Electricity consumption for interior lights */,
  "interior_equipment_electricity" REAL /* Electricity consumption for interior equipment */,
  "gas_facility" REAL /* Gas consumption for the facility */,
  "heating_gas" REAL /* Gas consumption for heating */,
  "interior_equipment_gas" REAL /* Gas consumption for interior equipment */,
  "water_heater_gas" REAL /* Gas consumption for water heating */,
  "renewable_energy" REAL /* Renewable energy usage (solar, wind, etc.) */,
  "energy_efficiency" REAL /* Energy efficiency rating (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp", "facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_system_performance" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy system */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the energy system is in */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was recorded */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Performance metric (e.g., temperature, pressure, etc.) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id", "facility_id", "timestamp")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_conservation_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy conservation measure */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the measure is implemented in */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy conservation measure */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the measure was implemented */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy conservation measure */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of implementing the measure */,
  "savings" REAL /* Expected energy savings from the measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_conservation_measures_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_reporting" (
  "reporting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory report */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the report is for */,
  "reporting_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was submitted */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of report submission (submitted, pending, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_reporting_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_facility_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the user has access to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (read-only, edit, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "facility_id")
)
